hero.title: .NET & Blazor Developer
hero.tagline: Full-stack .NET developer — Blazor, APIs, databases and everything in between.
about.title: About Me
about.bio1.start: I'm a full-stack .NET developer based in Warsaw, with 4.5+ years of hands-on
about.bio1.end: experience and a background in .NET dating back to my university days. Day to day I build and maintain Blazor Server and WebAssembly apps, design RESTful APIs with ASP.NET Core, and manage databases — end to end, from UI to query.
about.bio2: Outside of work I recharge in the mountains, train BJJ, run, and occasionally disappear on a long bike ride. I also compete in dog sports with my dog. I read popular science books and I'm currently open to new opportunities — remote-first, with up to one day a week on-site in Warsaw.
techstack.title: Tech Stack
projects.title: Projects
projects.portfolio.name: Portfolio Site
projects.portfolio.desc: This portfolio — a single-page Blazor WebAssembly app hosted on GitHub Pages. Dark-mode design with smooth scroll navigation.
projects.loyalty.name: Loyalty Program Platform
projects.loyalty.desc: Full-stack multi-tenant platform for managing loyalty programs. Built with Blazor Server, ASP.NET Core and MS SQL Server — covering everything from backend APIs and database design to MudBlazor dashboards. Deployed for multiple clients.
experience.title: Experience
experience.bullet1.1: Developing and maintaining a multi-tenant loyalty program platform (Blazor Server, ASP.NET Core, MS SQL Server).
experience.bullet1.2: Implementing new features end-to-end — from database design to MudBlazor dashboards.
experience.bullet1.3: Managing client communication, sending campaign messages and building survey tools.
experience.bullet2.1: Deployed a document workflow management system at client sites.
experience.bullet2.2: Conducted system configuration, user training and post-deployment support.
experience.bullet2.3: Wrote SQL scripts to support data migration and system setup.
education.title: Education
education.desc1: Thesis topic: "Modeling an investment portfolio using machine learning techniques"
education.desc2: Thesis topic: "Training plan generator for runners"
contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.intro: I'm currently open to new opportunities. Whether you have a project in mind, want to collaborate, or just want to say hi — my inbox is always open.
